problem id: 78cf1c8f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(5) XOR SHR(4)) AND ROT(5)

examples:
  10001101 -> 10100000
  00100011 -> 01100000
  11101111 -> 11101100
  10010011 -> 01100000
  01101110 -> 11000100
  11100011 -> 01101100
  11101110 -> 11001100
  00111010 -> 01000011
  11100101 -> 10101100

query: 01101000
predicted answer: 00000100
